summary: PR #13 reviewed and approved. Presentation-layer redesign verified: 0 layer violations, color tokenization complete (0 hardcoded Color(0x...) in lib/features/), no new raw Material widgets introduced, l10n comprehensive (~140 new ARB keys), dart analyze 0 errors/0 warnings, flutter test 28 pass/4 pre-existing fail. 3 deferred non-blockers. Security: no secrets, Firebase auth via envied. Decision: APPROVED.
